results.title: Cloud Engineer at FactSet | Canary Wharfian
highlights:
# Cloud Engineer
...
**Cloud Engineer - FactSet** - Key Responsibilities: Leverage AWS/GCP to drive cloud migration & digital transformation, build governed cloud services, ensure cloud security & high availability, collaborate cross-functionally. - Required Skills: 3+ years of hands-on public cloud experience, proficiency in Python, GoLang, Terraform, experience with Docker, EC2/ASG, Serverless, networking services, strong problem-solving, and generative AI familiarity. - Education: Bachelor's degree in information/computer science, engineering, or related discipline with IT focus required. - Experience Level: 3+ years in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, working cross-functionally.
...
Cloud has and remains a core enabler for several of our enterprise strategies: rounding the corner on Digital Transformation, executing on M&A, driving Investment Programs, and enabling GenAI. The Platform Infrastructure Engineering Team at FactSet is looking for an additional member for the Cloud team. The team is comprised of Cloud Architects and Engineers, focusing on overall Cloud Architecture strategy & execution, and enablement of the organization to create and run optimized Cloud Native solutions aligned to our Internal Developer Platform. The Cloud Engineer will help maximize the benefit FactSet receives from its usage of public cloud.  The engineer will directly contribute to the growth of the business by building well governed cloud services and capabilities across FactSets public cloud partners.

results.title: FactSet AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
FactSet Research Systems (FDS) has positioned itself as a leader in AI-driven financial intelligence, delivering significant technological innovations throughout 2025[1][2][3]. The company has launched multiple AI-powered solutions including Pitch Creator for investment bankers, Portfolio Commentary for asset managers, and FactSet Mercury, an AI-powered chatbot providing conversational access to financial data[4][5]. In December 2025, FactSet achieved a notable competitive advantage by launching the financial industry's first production-grade Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, outpacing Bloomberg to market with this emerging AI standard[6]. The company's fiscal 2025 performance demonstrated strong fundamentals with revenue reaching $2.32 billion (up 5.4% year-over-year) and organic Annual Subscription Value (ASV) growing 5.7% to $2.37 billion[7]. FactSet's strategic focus on AI integration is evident through its comprehensive AI Partner Program, partnerships with technology leaders like Databricks and Hebbia, and the development of Enterprise AI Building Blocks that enable clients to integrate FactSet's AI capabilities into their own technology stacks[8][9].
...

Notably, non-tech roles have a higher AI mention rate (14.9%) than tech roles (7.7%), indicating AI skills are expected across business functions. Customer Service leads at 40%, suggesting AI integration in client-facing operations.

#### Lead Machine Learning Engineer (Current)

#### Senior Machine Learning Engineer
...
Developing an LLM-based Python code generator designed specifically for banking applications. Equivalent to ChatGPT's advanced analytics, this in-house tool is enhanced with FactSet data and is able to answer simple and complex queries. This multi-agent system is capable of decomposing user questions into retrievable pieces of data, writing complex logical statements to filter and fetch that data, writing code to solve the problem, and executing the code in a secure environment in order to procure the desired answer and return an appropriate answer to the user. This code generator is an integral part of FactSet Mercury, a novel solution to access FactSet’s comprehensive financial fundamentals and pricing data, along with extensive bank and branch regulatory data through an integrated suite of generative AI (GenAI) tools surfaced in a single chat interface.
...

results.title: Sanyam Oberoi
highlights:
Lead Machine Learning Engineer at FactSet | IIM Alumnus
...
Lead Machine Learning Engineer at [FactSet](https://www.linkedin.com/company/factset)
...
I am an Artificial Intelligence (AI) practitioner, who views AI as a Strategic Tool and believes that correct implementation of the same can ensue strategic differentiation for firms. A seasoned Machine Learning Engineer (MLE) with 7.5+ years of hands-on experience in building production-grade GenAI, NLP and ML solutions, and setting up performance evaluation framework. Experienced in leading architecture design discussions, collaborating with product stakeholders to drive projects from conceptualization/ requirements gathering to production deployment, and delivering technical presentations. In my current role, I manage a team of 3 junior MLEs. My experience in AI spans across Generative AI, NLP, ML, Time Series and Recommender Systems, having worked on conceptualization, implementation and deployment of multiple use-cases in Financial Services, ESG, Media and Legal sectors. Some of the use-cases I've worked on in the past include: setting up event-triggered custom RAG pipelines for ESG; building Knowledge Graph from unstructured documents to implement GraphRAG; fine-tuning LLMs, vector retrievers and rerankers; building muli-step chained LLM workflows (prompt engineering); performing ONNX model optimization and dynamic quantization of transformer models; developing NLP workflows using OCR, NER, Sentiment Analysis and Classification; performing market segmentation; building hybrid-search Information Retrieval systems; performing document summarization; Sensitive Information (PII) Masking; Customer Sentiment Analysis; Customer Attrition Prediction; Cross-Sell Recommendation; and New Sales Opportunity Win Prediction modelling.

results.title: Kenan Gonnot
highlights:
AI Engineer | LLM Systems • Multi-Agent Architectures • MLOps • RAG • Kubernetes
...
Software Engineer II - AI & Agentic Systems FactSet - Paris at [FactSet](https://www.linkedin.com/company/factset)
...
AI Engineer specialized in Large Language Models, multi-agent systems, and production-ready ML architectures. I design and build end-to-end AI systems — from model training to scalable deployment — with a strong focus on reliability, cost optimization, and real-world impact. Over the past years, I have: • Built RAG-powered systems for automated document understanding • Trained and optimized Transformer-based models (10M–7B parameters) • Designed multi-agent architectures capable of orchestrating complex reasoning workflows • Deployed scalable ML systems using Docker, Kubernetes, and GCP • Led AI projects from experimentation to production My approach combines deep technical expertise with a product-oriented mindset. I enjoy transforming messy, real-world data into robust, scalable AI systems that deliver measurable value. Currently open to AI Engineer / LLM Engineer opportunities in Paris and Japan. French-Japanese citizen. You can explore more about my work and achievements at 🌐
...
### Software Engineer II - AI & Agentic Systems FactSet - Paris at [FactSet](https://www.linkedin.com/company/factset) (Current)
...
Working at the intersection of AI engineering and technical leadership within FactSet's performance management and reporting solutions. My focus is on three pillars: * Prompt Engineering — Designing and optimizing prompts for production LLM systems, running evaluations in complex scenarios, and building team-wide guidelines and best practices around effective AI usage. * Agentic AI Development — Architecting and deploying agentic workflows integrated into existing financial data products, leveraging MCP tooling and AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot) across the full software lifecycle — from design and coding to testing and deployment. * Engineering Leadership — Mentoring experienced engineers to sharpen their productivity and AI fluency, and fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation within the team.
...
**Project MAS – Multi-Agent LLM System (Ongoing)** Design and development of a modular multi-agent AI system focused on orchestrating Large Language Models to solve complex tasks autonomously. This project explores how structured agent collaboration can improve reliability, reasoning depth, and scalability compared to single-LLM pipelines. Key aspects: • Architecture of role-based agents (Planner, Critic, Executor, Validator) • Orchestrated reasoning workflows with feedback loops and self-correction • Integration of external tools, APIs, and retrieval systems (RAG) • Memory management and context control to reduce hallucinations • Cost and latency optimization for production-grade deployment The system is built with a strong engineering mindset: * Modular design (extensible agents & workflows) * Clean separation between orchestration logic and model inference * Production-ready deployment considerations (Docker, Kubernetes) Objective: move beyond prompt engineering and design robust, scalable, agentic AI systems capable of structured reasoning and autonomous task execution. As a Technical Writer at FactSet, I spend a lot of time thinking about documentation quality at scale. We have 25,000+ pages of product documentation. Every product change filed by a developer has the potential to make some of them stale. And stale documentation doesn't just frustrate users — it contaminates the retrieval corpus feeding our GenAI products. It's not a documentation problem. It's a data quality problem.
...
I started with a rough concept for an AI pipeline that could connect product change signals to documentation updates automatically. And
...
won Runner-Up in
...
Best Agentic AI Solution category as
...
IDEAthon submission
...
OA Sync Agent is a seven-agent AI orchestration pipeline, built entirely on FactSet's internal Agent Builder platform. It monitors incoming product change requests (RPDs), identifies which documentation pages are affected using semantic search, drafts writer review packages, prepares stakeholder notifications, runs a corpus health check, and produces a governance readiness score — all triggered by a single event, all with a mandatory human approval gate before anything is dispatched.
...
I'm a writer. Not an engineer. I built the entire thing — seven agent system prompts, a custom MCP server, a staging deployment, and a governance dashboard — using AI-assisted development, FactSet's own tooling, and a lot of late nights.

### Location Prediction of Twitter Users Leveraging Wikipedia
...
The geographic location of a Twitter user can be used in many applications such as Personalization and Recommendation systems. This work explores the use of an external knowledge-base (Wikipedia) to predict the location of a Twitter user based on the contents of their tweets and compares this approach to the existing statistical approaches. The key contribution of this work is that it does not require a training data set of geo-tagged tweets as used by the state-of-the-art approaches.
...
Traffic congestions have become a major issue in many cities around
...
world. At Kno.e.sis, researches work on understanding city issues such as traffic problems to provide insights to decision/policy makers. We pursue this understanding utilizing a unique approach of processing both machine sensor data and citizen sensor data related to traffic. Citizen sensor observations complement or corroborate machine sensor observations and when processed together leads to deeper insights into a Cyber-Physical-Social system like a city. Show less
...
The overall aim of PREDOSE is to develop techniques to facilitate prescription drug abuse epidemiology, related to the illicit use of pharmaceutical opioids. The goal was to identify trending positive or negative sentiments associated with specific drugs with research interest.

results.title: FactSet Announces Strategic Partnership with Google Cloud to Bring Advanced AI to Financial Intelligence
highlights:
FactSet Announces Strategic Partnership with Google Cloud to Bring Advanced AI to Financial Intelligence Accessibility Statement Skip Navigation
...
NORWALK, Conn., June 30, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- FactSet, a leading global data and AI solutions provider to the financial markets, today announced a multi-faceted strategic partnership with Google Cloud to create a new generation of AI-powered solutions for the financial industry. The collaboration addresses a growing demand from financial firms for workflow-specific agentic solutions that are powered by trusted data and fully sourced, auditable, and defensible in regulated environments. The partnership supports FactSet's broader AI vision by delivering agentic experiences across the investment and deal-making lifecycles.
...
- FactSet AI enhanced with Gemini models: FactSet is embedding Google's enterprise Search and Gemini model capabilities in its Workstation via Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to launch the next generation of agents for finance. The partnership will accelerate the development of new Workstation products with deep research functionality and multi-modal experiences, leveraging Google Cloud's broad range of AI capabilities. Direct integration with Google grounding will supplement FactSet's financial data and improve both the breadth and depth of FactSet's AI-enhanced insights.
...
- Deeper financial intelligence in Gemini Enterprise: Building on the previously announced collaboration with Google DeepMind, FactSet's MCP and agent sharing functionality will deepen the financial intelligence in Gemini Enterprise – Google Cloud's AI platform for building, governing, and deploying agents. Through this integration, financial professionals will benefit from seamless interoperability between the FactSet Workstation and Gemini Enterprise.
...
- Jointly developed agentic workflows: FactSet and Google Cloud plan to launch a new generation of agents – to be built using the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform – that are designed to improve efficiency, execution, and decision-making across portfolio operations, deal advisory, and corporate finance.
...
"AI is fundamentally shifting how financial professionals access data, derive insights, and make decisions," said Sanoke Viswanathan, chief executive officer of FactSet. "Together with Google Cloud, we are putting trusted financial data and advanced AI capabilities to work, empowering our clients with more intuitive, connected, and intelligent agents."
...
"Financial institutions require AI tools that anchor advanced technology in reliable, industry-specific intelligence," said Karthik Narain, chief product and business officer of Google Cloud. "By combining Google Cloud's agentic AI capabilities with FactSet's deep financial expertise, we are enabling investment professionals to surface insights faster, automate complex workflows, and realize commercial value from AI."
...
About FactSetFactSet (NYSE: FDS) (NASDAQ: FDS) supercharges financial intelligence, offering enterprise data and information solutions that power our clients to maximize their potential. Our cutting-edge digital platform seamlessly integrates proprietary financial data, client datasets, third-party sources, and flexible technology to deliver tailored solutions across the buy-side, sell-side, wealth management, private equity, and corporate sectors. With over 47 years of expertise, offices in 19 countries, and extensive multi-asset class coverage, we leverage advanced data connectivity alongside AI and next-generation tools to streamline workflows, drive productivity, and enable smarter, faster decision-making. Serving more than 9,000 global clients and over 241,000 individual users, FactSet is a member of the S&P 500 dedicated to innovation and long-term client success. Learn more at www.factset.com and follow us on X and LinkedIn.

Pacman and Ghost Agent | Python | Artificial Intelligence | Search-based Algorithms | Learning-based Algorithms Implemented general search algorithms, minimax and expectimax search, value iteration, Q-learning and inference-based learning to create Pacman and Ghost Agents for competitive gameplay Project 1 - Pacman agent will find paths through his maze world, both to reach a particular location and to collect food efficiently. General search algorithms are built and applied to multiple Pacman scenarios. Project 2 - Pacman and ghost agents for the classic version of Pacman are designed. Along the way, both minimax and expectimax search is implemented along with evaluation function design. Project 3 - Value iteration and Q-learning has been implemented. The agents are first tested on Gridworld (from class) and then run in a simulated robot controller (Crawler) and Pacman. Project 4 - Pacman agents that use sensors to locate and eat invisible ghosts are designed. The code moves from locating single, stationary ghosts to hunting packs of multiple moving ghosts with ruthless efficiency. Contest - The contest involves a multiplayer capture-the-flag variant of Pacman, where agents control both Pacman and ghosts in coordinated team-based strategies. I'm incredibly proud to share our first customer case study with AtoB , highlighting how they're using Socratix AI to deliver instant, best-underwriter judgment across their credit decisions. 

Underwriting requires judgment that goes well beyond scores or simple thresholds - blending transaction data, utilization trends, policy guardrails, and qualitative context. ### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/robert-robie-001518b_after-nearly-26-incredible-years-at-factset-activity-7467698088548208640-fI0N
...
After nearly 26 incredible years at FactSet, the time has come for me to begin a new chapter.
...
Looking back, I am filled with gratitude for the opportunities, experiences, and relationships that have shaped my journey. FactSet is truly an industry leader, distinguished not only by its exceptional clients and partners, but by the people and culture that form the foundation of its success.
...
While there are far too many individuals to thank by name, I want to express my sincere appreciation to every FactSet colleague—past and present—who invested in one another, our clients, and our partners. The commitment, collaboration, and passion of this community are what make FactSet such a remarkable company and a leader in our industry. I have no doubt that FactSet will continue to innovate, differentiate itself, and help shape the future of financial technology for years to come.
...
To everyone who has supported, guided, challenged, and trusted me over the past two and a half decades—both within FactSet and across our broader client and partner community—thank you. Your impact on my career and life has been profound, and I will always be deeply grateful.
...
As I close this chapter, I do so with tremendous pride, lasting friendships, and countless memories. I am excited for what lies ahead and equally excited to watch FactSet continue its success story.
...
Wishing everyone continued success and all the very best. The future is bright.

results.title: Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research | Hirevector
highlights:
Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research | Hirevector
...
# Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research
...
18, 2026
...
The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. The successful candidate will work closely with data scientists and product leads to implement AI models, build required data and code pipelines through rigorous engineering disciplines You should have expertise in the design, development, management, and maintenance of systems and handling of large datasets. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.
...
- Coordinate between Data Scientists and Product Analysts
- Automate infrastructure used by the Data Science team
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced AI models and algorithms to solve complex business problems.
- Test and deploy models
- Develop minimum viable products based on machine learning
- Automate processes by utilizing machine learning
- Lead AI projects from conception to implementation, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality outcomes.
- Ability to create AI models utilizing deep learning, neural networks, and ML algorithms to derive business insights and fuel informed decision-making
...
- Advanced experience in programming, software engineering, and data science fields
...
- Mentor and coach junior associates on the team
- Ability to utilize various tools and methods to process data as well as create and keep up AI systems
...
- Communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders through clear and compelling data visualizations and presentations.
...
- 5+ years of practical experience as an engineer with focus on implementation of AI / ML machine learning solutions.
- Masters in Computer Science / Machine Learning / AI, or related work experience with the design, building and evaluation of Machine Learning systems.
...
- 3+ years' experience with Machine Learning ecosystem tools, including pytorch/tensorflow, scikit-learn, xgboost or equivalents.
...
- Advanced knowledge of MLOps fundamentals, including orchestration tools, cloud compute, and observability tools.
...
- Advanced understanding of cloud platforms e.g. Azure / GCP / AWS and their AI tool set
...
- Practical experience working with data and code pipelines
- Ability to work independently with limited supervision
- Ability to implement, test and deploy Machine Learning models.
...
- Advanced experience with langchain / llamaindex / haystack / Azure AI studio, vector databases and retrieval techniques, or equivalent common tools in the emerging LLM-enable tech stack is a plus.
...
- Skilled in accessing and handling databases via SQL, Azure Data Factory or similar.
...
- Alternatively, familiarity with data storage/management systems or Big Data framework (like Hadoop, Spark) expected to be known or used. Advanced knowledge in Software Development best practices such as Continuous Integration, Unit/Integration Testing, Code Reviews.
